title: Adjusting the slab depth control
capture_instructions: Split-viewport layout. Show the slab depth control clearly — it may be in the 2D panel sidebar or a floating panel. Capture a state where the slab depth has been increased to a visible value (e.g., 2.0 m) so the number is readable. Annotate the control and ideally show two states (thin vs. thick slab) by showing the 2D viewport with a moderate depth that has clearly bounded slab edges.
ui_state: Plan/Profile active, slab depth control visible and set to a non-default value

annotations.label: Slab Depth control (numeric input or slider)
2D view — points inside the slab depth are shown
Increase value to widen the slice
